title: pulmonaria longistyla
intro: Pulmonaria longistyla is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as lungwort, due to its historical association with the lungs and respiratory system. Traditionally, Pulmonaria longistyla has been used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are thought to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which may help to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being. Pulmonaria longistyla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
